case_title: NUNAPHAT SMYKLA-HARUANSAN, ET AL VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMYKLA-HARUANSAN, NUNAPHAT LA SMYKLA, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SMYKLA-HARUANSAN, NUNAPHAT LA SMYKLA, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-20-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-09-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-20-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-20-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS NUNAPHAT SMYKLA-HARUANSAN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BYROBIN CHENG, VICE PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2017 - JUDGMENT.
